title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.

title: Mere Pyare Prime Minister
subTitle: After his mother is raped one night, Kannu, an eight-year-old boy, writes a letter to the prime minister of India and embarks on a journey from Mumbai to Delhi with his two friends.

title: Awarapan
subTitle: A hitman sets out to rescue his boss's mistress and send her back to her boyfriend after learning that she is a victim of sex trafficking.

title: Sajini Shinde Ka Viral Video
subTitle: School teacher Sajini Shinde goes missing after a risque video of her is leaked on the internet. As the case becomes a public scandal, a police officer searches for the truth.

title: F.A.L.T.U
subTitle: Four desperate friends, who secure poor grades in their examinations, concoct a fake university when they fail to secure college admissions and face dismal futures.

title: Radhe Shyam
subTitle: Despite being a doctor with no inclination towards superstitious beliefs, Prerana places her love and faith in Aditya, a palmist whose predictions turn out to be too spot-on to be disregarded.

title: Dhadak 2
subTitle: Nilesh and Vidhi fall in love with each other. However, tragedy strikes when the caste differences threaten to end their relationship.

title: Krrish
subTitle: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveals his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Pardes
subTitle: Kishorilal wants an Indian bride for his NRI son; he gets him engaged to Ganga, his friend's daughter. However, she seems to share a deeper bond with Arjun, Kishorilal's foster son.

title: Fukrey 3
subTitle: The Fukras plan to take over Delhi and run for city elections. However, they have no money, so they take on an international job to make a quick buck, which changes their lives forever.

title: Fukrey 3
subTitle: The Fukras plan to take over Delhi and run for city elections. However, they have no money, so they take on an international job to make a quick buck, which changes their lives forever.

title: Mercury
subTitle: After a high school reunion, five friends accidentally kill a blind man. Later, they are terrorised by the victim's vengeful ghost.

title: Gangster
subTitle: Simran, who relocates to Seoul, is distraught when Daya, a gangster, re-enters her life. She has to make a choice between him and her lover Akash, who is a singer at an Indian restaurant.

title: Dhokha
subTitle: A police officer (Muzammil Ibrahim) becomes a terrorist suspect after a deadly bombing at a club.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Kanjoos Makkichoos
subTitle: Jamnaprasad Pandey intends to send his parents on a pilgrimage. However, things take a devastating turn when they disappear during a flood.

title: Vedaa
subTitle: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings.

title: Koogle Kuttappa
subTitle: A conservative villager hates the idea of his son relocating to Russia for a job. However, when his son brings a robot to care for him, he develops an unlikely bond with the machine.

title: Shivam
subTitle: Shiva is a carefree lad who helps couples in love marry. Soon, he finds his own heart stolen, while being pursued by enemies determined to break them apart.

title: Aparichit - The Stranger
subTitle: Ramanujam, who suffers from multiple personality disorder, works as a lawyer by day and a vigilante at night. He uses tips from the 'Garuda Purana' as his tools to expose various antisocial elements.

title: Sooryavanshi
subTitle: With the looming threat of a terrorist attack on Mumbai, ATS chief Sooryavanshi embarks on a mission to hunt for 600 kgs of missing RDX and the conspiring perpetrators.

title: Khoonkhaar
subTitle: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.

title: Khoonkhaar
subTitle: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.

title: Mujhe Kucch Kehna Hai
subTitle: An accident brings Karan and Pooja close to each other. When Karan finally decides to propose to her, he realises that destiny has other plans for them.

title: Ragini MMS 2
subTitle: A director's decision to film an erotic horror movie in a haunted house brings trouble when a spirit possesses the body of the lead actress.

title: MP3: Mera Pehla Pehla Pyar
subTitle: Rohan and Ayesha are a couple but their relationship turns sour due to rumours that they are dating different people. Subsequently, they part ways, only to realise that they are making a mistake.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Crocodile Island
subTitle: Stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.

title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
subTitle: Vishwas, the son of a widow, wants to be an actor despite his mother's wish that he become a police inspector. However, his life takes a turn when he gets entangled with a criminal gang.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Karthikeya 2
subTitle: The movie deals with the personal problems of Karthik and how he comes out of them. His pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of Indian ancient system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Ab Tumhare Hawale Watan Saathiyo
subTitle: Kunal falls in love with Shweta and decides to stay in the army to get close to her but soon finds out that she is waiting for her husband Rajeev to return from war.

title: Judaai
subTitle: Shashikant and Gauri get married in honour of his late father's will. But, marital problems soon arise when Gauri suspects him of having an affair, leading to a chain of misunderstandings.

title: Big Dhamaka
subTitle: Two men look alike, with one of them being a successful businessman and the other trying to find work. Despite their differences, they end up falling for the same woman.
